description: Repos with state/ directories containing only .gitkeep files aren't actually using governance state. The presence of scaffolded directories creates a false sense of integration — the structure exists but no beliefs, PDCA cycles, or evolution logs are being recorded. This is governance theater, not governance adoption.
source_patterns: belief:2026-03-17-ix-governance-integration — state/beliefs/ is empty, no PDCA records, no knowledge transfers
belief:2026-03-17-tars-governance-integration — state/ directories all empty except one compliance snapshot
belief:2026-03-17-ga-governance-integration — no state/ directory at all, no belief states
belief:2026-03-17-consumer-repo-integration-status — directives exist as sample data but have not been transmitted
